sense.serverInstructions:
When Sense is available and indexed, you MUST use Sense tools instead of grep, glob, or exploration agents for codebase understanding, exploration, and research. Sense provides pre-indexed results that are faster and more complete.

WHEN TO USE SENSE TOOLS:
- Symbol relationships, callers, dependencies → sense.graph
- "What would break if I changed X?", impact analysis → sense.blast
- Conceptual/semantic code search (not exact string match) → sense.search
- Project patterns and conventions → sense.conventions
- Index health, what's indexed → sense.status
- ANY question about how the codebase works or is structured → start with Sense

WHEN NOT TO USE SENSE TOOLS:
- Exact text/string search → use grep
- Reading file contents → use your file reading tool
- Editing code → Sense is read-only
